description_long: This tram is a rectangular, elongated vehicle with a dark green body and a flat roof, running on a set of metal rails embedded in a gravel or sand-colored ground. The sides feature a series of evenly spaced, rectangular windows, providing visibility and light for passengers inside. The tram has a set of metal wheels and undercarriage components visible beneath the body, and a raised pantograph structure on the roof for electrical connection. Entry and exit doors are located along the sides, with a platform area adjacent to the rails for passenger access. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality for urban public transport.
description: A dark green, rectangular tram with side windows, roof-mounted pantograph, and metal wheels on rails, designed for urban passenger transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tram's narrow end, rails, and a glimpse of the roof pantograph.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of windows, side doors, and the full length of the tram on rails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite narrow end and rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the windows, doors, and the tram's length on rails.
attribute_door_configuration: two sliding doors on each side, centrally located
attribute_window_arrangement: six large, evenly spaced rectangular windows per side, separated by narrow vertical frames
